metadata.gitb:name: Belgian Patient Flow: FHIR Validation
metadata.gitb:description: Loads the Belgian Core IG, generates BePatient test data, validates against the be-patient profile, checks structure with matchetype, and evaluates FHIRPath expressions.

gitb:actor.gitb:name: Tester
gitb:actor.gitb:desc: The user initiating the Belgian Patient validation test flow.

gitb:actor.gitb:name: FHIR Validator
gitb:actor.gitb:desc: The HL7 FHIR Validator CLI running as an HTTP service.
